careerObjective: Software Engineer with 5 years of experience in Front-End and BFF development, specializing in React.js, TypeScript, and scalable web applications. Experienced in building performant, accessible (WCAG), and user-centric solutions using REST APIs across Node.js, BFF, and Java services. Skilled in leading projects, mentoring developers, and driving Agile delivery while actively exploring AI/ML and prompt engineering-driven solutions.

education.institution: Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute Of Technology and Management, Bhantakal

highlights: Developed SPA, BFF, and service-layer components using React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and REST APIs
Contributed to system architecture discussions and design improvements
Led accessibility (WCAG) compliance efforts and resolved critical a11y issues
Introduced Storybook across teams to improve component reusability and documentation
Worked as Developer and Scrum Master ensuring Agile delivery
Mentored junior developers on architecture, workflows, and best practices
Collaborated with cross-functional teams for scalable product delivery
Recognized as Spotlight of the Month (December)
Built Front-End and BFF components using React.js and Node.js
Developed and maintained REST APIs for scalable backend services
Led MUI v5 migration improving performance and accessibility
Automated testing using Jest, React Testing Library, and MABL
Fixed Veracode security vulnerabilities and improved compliance
Ensured WCAG accessibility standards and localization support
Managed Agile/Scrum processes and sprint execution
Mentored interns and conducted code reviews
Secured 3rd place in iCIMS Hackathon 2024 for AI-powered chatbot project
Developed responsive and accessible web applications using React.js
Built Humanify Neighbourhood platform for engagement and collaboration
Focused on UI/UX, accessibility, and performance optimization
Ensured localization and inclusive design practices
Contributed to award-winning projects and received multiple Spotlight awards

projects.name: Config Transport & Content Transport

projects.impact: Enabled seamless configuration migrations with improved reliability and reduced deployment issues.
